ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* Size in the international standard */,
  "european_size" INTEGER /* Size in the European standard */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size in the UK standard */,
  "france_size" INTEGER /* Size in the French standard */,
  "italy_size" TEXT /* Size in the Italian standard */,
  "germany_size" INTEGER /* Size in the German standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the conversion entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the conversion entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the conversion entry is currently active */,
  "source_standard" TEXT /* Source size standard */,
  "target_standard" TEXT /* Target size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product is designed for */,
  "multi_currency_price" TEXT /* Prices in multiple currencies */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the product for better categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product size is currently active */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reorder */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product size was last restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Standard of the size (e.g., international, european, uk) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is currently active */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is currently active */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Notes or special instructions for the order */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order has been cancelled */,
  "cancelled_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
